name: Cleric
summary: Divine spellcaster. Channels positive or negative energy, prepares spells from the cleric list and from two chosen domains.

class_features.name: Aura
class_features.summary: Cleric of a non-neutral deity has a strong aura of their deity's alignment.

class_features.name: Channel Energy 1d6
class_features.summary: Standard action, 30-ft burst centered on cleric. Heals (good) or harms (evil) living, harms (good) or heals (evil) undead. 1d6 at L1, +1d6 every 2 levels. Used 3 + Cha mod times per day. Will save half (DC 10 + 1/2 level + Cha).

class_features.name: Domains
class_features.summary: Choose two domains from the deity's list. Each grants a 1st-level domain power and a domain spell slot per level.

class_features.name: Spontaneous Casting
class_features.summary: May convert any prepared cleric spell into a cure (good) or inflict (evil) spell of the same level.

class_features.name: Orisons
class_features.summary: Prepares 0-level cleric spells; they are not expended when cast.
